info.title: winmux-server streaming
info.description: WebSocket frame contract for winmux-server (PHASE-77-DESIGN §4.4). STUB in S2 — the chat + workspace channels and their per-`type` frame schemas are populated in S3. The frame_version is advertised by GET /api/version.

/ws/claude/session/{id}.description: Chat session stream (legacy path; v2 alias in a later sprint). Frames are JSON objects discriminated by `type` — assistant_delta, tool_use, tool_result, notification, hook_request, hook_resolved, status, error (server→client) and hook_decision, user_message (client→server). Full per-type schemas land in S3.

Frame.summary: Envelope common to every frame (S3 will add per-type oneOf).

seq.description: monotonic per session; gap detection + resume
